raw.message: Spark a love for reading with the award-winning reading app that makes reading fun & easy.

hook.summary: A mother and child share a warm moment using a tablet together in a cozy home setting.
hook.visual_action: Mother and son smile at a tablet screen while animated characters float nearby.
hook.voiceover_transcript: There's a magic to that moment. Welcome to Reading Eggs.

scene_flow: Mother and child bonding while using the educational app on a tablet.
Close-up of the child's hand interacting with the 'Reading Eggs' logo on screen.
Phonics gameplay demonstration where the child pops bubbles to spell 'cat'.
Contextual learning showing the word 'splat' as food falls into a bowl.
Final end card with trial offer and app store download links.
audience_proxy: Parents of toddlers and primary school children seeking engaging educational apps.
